verses.latin_vulgate: Ascendit ergo Moyses de campestribus Moab super montem Nebo, in verticem Phasga contra Jericho : ostenditque ei Dominus omnem terram Galaad usque Dan,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֨עַל מֹשֶׁ֜ה מֵעַרְבֹ֤ת מוֹאָב֙ אֶל־הַ֣ר נְב֔וֹ רֹ֚אשׁ הַפִּסְגָּ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־פְּנֵ֣י יְרֵח֑וֹ וַיַּרְאֵ֨הוּ יְהֹוָ֧ה אֶת־כׇּל־הָאָ֛רֶץ אֶת־הַגִּלְעָ֖ד עַד־דָּֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then Moses went up from the plains of Moab upon mount Nebo, to the top of Phasga over against Jericho: and the Lord shewed him all the land of Galaad as far as Dan.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses meni Moabin kedoilta ja astui Nebon vuorelle, Pisgan kukkulalle, joka on Jerihon kohdalla; ja Herra osoitti hänelle kaiken Gileadin maan Daniin asti,
verses.king_james: And Moses went up from the plains of Moab unto the mountain of Nebo, to the top of Pisgah, that is over against Jericho. And the Lord shewed him all the land of Gilead, unto Dan,

verses.latin_vulgate: et universum Nephthali, terramque Ephraim et Manasse, et omnem terram Juda usque ad mare novissimum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵת֙ כׇּל־נַפְתָּלִ֔י וְאֶת־אֶ֥רֶץ אֶפְרַ֖יִם וּמְנַשֶּׁ֑ה וְאֵת֙ כׇּל־אֶ֣רֶץ יְהוּדָ֔ה עַ֖ד הַיָּ֥ם הָאַחֲרֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all Nephtali, and the land of Ephraim and Manasses, and all the land of Juda unto the furthermost sea,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koko Naphtalin ja Ephraimin ja Manassen maan, ja kaiken Juudan maan viimeiseen mereen asti,
verses.king_james: And all Naphtali, and the land of Ephraim, and Manasseh, and all the land of Judah, unto the utmost sea,

verses.latin_vulgate: et australem partem, et latitudinem campi Jericho civitatis palmarum usque Segor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַנֶּ֗גֶב וְֽאֶת־הַכִּכָּ֞ר בִּקְעַ֧ת יְרֵח֛וֹ עִ֥יר הַתְּמָרִ֖ים עַד־צֹֽעַר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the south part, and the breadth of the plain of Jericho the city of palm trees as far as Segor.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja etelämaan, ja aukian kedon Palmukaupungin Jerihon tykönä, hamaan Zoariin asti.
verses.king_james: And the south, and the plain of the valley of Jericho, the city of palm trees, unto Zoar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Dominus ad eum : Hæc est terra, pro qua juravi Abraham, Isaac, et Jacob, dicens : Semini tuo dabo eam. Vidisti eam oculis tuis, et non transibis ad illam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֵלָ֗יו זֹ֤את הָאָ֙רֶץ֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר נִ֠שְׁבַּ֠עְתִּי לְאַבְרָהָ֨ם לְיִצְחָ֤ק וּֽלְיַעֲקֹב֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר לְזַרְעֲךָ֖ אֶתְּנֶ֑נָּה הֶרְאִיתִ֣יךָ בְעֵינֶ֔יךָ וְשָׁ֖מָּה לֹ֥א תַעֲבֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to him: This is the land, for which I swore to Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob, saying: I will give it to thy seed. Thou hast seen it with thy eyes, and shalt not pass over to it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi hänelle: tämä on se maa, jonka minä Abrahamille, Isaakille ja Jakobille vannoin ja sanoin: minä annan sen sinun siemenelles; sinä näit sen nyt silmilläs, vaan et sinä sinne tule.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto him, This is the land which I sware unto Abraham, unto Isaac, and unto Jacob, saying, I will give it unto thy seed: I have caused thee to see it with thine eyes, but thou shalt not go over thither.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mortuusque est ibi Moyses servus Domini, in terra Moab, jubente Domino :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֨מׇת שָׁ֜ם מֹשֶׁ֧ה עֶבֶד־יְהֹוָ֛ה בְּאֶ֥רֶץ מוֹאָ֖ב עַל־פִּ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses the servant of the Lord died there, in the land of Moab, by the commandment of the Lord:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses Herran palvelia kuoli siellä Moabin maalla, Herran sanan jälkeen.
verses.king_james: So Moses the servant of the Lord died there in the land of Moab, according to the word of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: et sepelivit eum in valle terræ Moab contra Phogor : et non cognovit homo sepulchrum ejus usque in præsentem diem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְבֹּ֨ר אֹת֤וֹ בַגַּי֙ בְּאֶ֣רֶץ מוֹאָ֔ב מ֖וּל בֵּ֣ית פְּע֑וֹר וְלֹא־יָדַ֥ע אִישׁ֙ אֶת־קְבֻ֣רָת֔וֹ עַ֖ד הַיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he buried him in the valley of the land of Moab over against Phogor: and no man hath known of his sepulchre until this present day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän hautasi hänen laaksoon, Moabin maalla, Peorin huoneen kohdalla. Ja ei ole yksikään saanut tietää hänen hautaansa tähän päivään asti.
verses.king_james: And he buried him in a valley in the land of Moab, over against Beth–peor: but no man knoweth of his sepulchre unto this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Moyses centum et viginti annorum erat quando mortuus est : non caligavit oculus ejus, nec dentes illius moti sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמֹשֶׁ֗ה בֶּן־מֵאָ֧ה וְעֶשְׂרִ֛ים שָׁנָ֖ה בְּמֹת֑וֹ לֹא־כָהֲתָ֥ה עֵינ֖וֹ וְלֹא־נָ֥ס לֵחֹֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moses was a hundred and twenty years old when he died: his eye was not dim, neither were his teeth moved.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses oli sadan ja kahdenkymmenen ajastaikainen, kuin hän kuoli; ei hänen silmänsä olleet pimenneet, ja hänen elämänsä neste ei ollut lakastunut.
verses.king_james: And Moses was an hundred and twenty years old when he died: his eye was not dim, nor his natural force abated.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fleveruntque eum filii Israël in campestribus Moab triginta diebus : et completi sunt dies planctus lugentium Moysen.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּבְכּוּ֩ בְנֵ֨י יִשְׂרָאֵ֧ל אֶת־מֹשֶׁ֛ה בְּעַֽרְבֹ֥ת מוֹאָ֖ב שְׁלֹשִׁ֣ים י֑וֹם וַֽיִּתְּמ֔וּ יְמֵ֥י בְכִ֖י אֵ֥בֶל מֹשֶֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the children of Israel mourned for him in the plains of Moab thirty days: and the days of their mourning in which they mourned Moses were ended.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Israelin lapset itkivät Mosesta Moabin kedoilla kolmekymmentä päivää; ja itku- ja valituspäivät Moseksesta täytettiin.
verses.king_james: And the children of Israel wept for Moses in the plains of Moab thirty days: so the days of weeping and mourning for Moses were ended.

verses.latin_vulgate: Josue vero filius Nun repletus est spiritu sapientiæ, quia Moyses posuit super eum manus suas. Et obedierunt ei filii Israël, feceruntque sicut præcepit Dominus Moysi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וִיהוֹשֻׁ֣עַ בִּן־נ֗וּן מָלֵא֙ ר֣וּחַ חׇכְמָ֔ה כִּֽי־סָמַ֥ךְ מֹשֶׁ֛ה אֶת־יָדָ֖יו עָלָ֑יו וַיִּשְׁמְע֨וּ אֵלָ֤יו בְּנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ וַֽיַּעֲשׂ֔וּ כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־מֹשֶֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Josue the son of Nun was filled with the spirit of wisdom, because Moses had laid his hands upon him. And the children of Israel obeyed him, and did as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Josua Nunin poika oli täytetty taidon hengellä, sillä Moses oli kätensä laskenut hänen päällensä; ja Israelin lapset olivat kuuliaiset hänelle ja tekivät niinkuin Herra oli Mosekselle käskenyt.
verses.king_james: And Joshua the son of Nun was full of the spirit of wisdom; for Moses had laid his hands upon him: and the children of Israel hearkened unto him, and did as the Lord commanded Moses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et non surrexit ultra propheta in Israël sicut Moyses, quem nosset Dominus facie ad faciem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־קָ֨ם נָבִ֥יא ע֛וֹד בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל כְּמֹשֶׁ֑ה אֲשֶׁר֙ יְדָע֣וֹ יְהֹוָ֔ה פָּנִ֖ים אֶל־פָּנִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there arose no more a prophet in Israel like unto Moses, whom the Lord knew face to face,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sitte ei yhtään prophetaa noussut Israelissa niinkuin Moses, jonka Herra tunsi kasvoista niin kasvoihin,
verses.king_james: And there arose not a prophet since in Israel like unto Moses, whom the Lord knew face to face,

verses.latin_vulgate: in omnibus signis atque portentis, quæ misit per eum, ut faceret in terra Ægypti Pharaoni, et omnibus servis ejus, universæque terræ illius,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְכׇל־הָ֨אֹתֹ֜ת וְהַמּוֹפְתִ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֤ר שְׁלָחוֹ֙ יְהֹוָ֔ה לַעֲשׂ֖וֹת בְּאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרָ֑יִם לְפַרְעֹ֥ה וּלְכׇל־עֲבָדָ֖יו וּלְכׇל־אַרְצֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: In all the signs and wonders, which he sent by him, to do in the land of Egypt to Pharao, and to all his servants, and to his whole land,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikkinaisissa tunnustähdeissa ja ihmeissä, joita Herra hänen lähetti tekemään Egyptin maalla Pharaolle ja kaikille hänen palvelioillensa, koko hänen maallensa,
verses.king_james: In all the signs and the wonders, which the Lord sent him to do in the land of Egypt to Pharaoh, and to all his servants, and to all his land,

verses.latin_vulgate: et cunctam manum robustam, magnaque mirabilia, quæ fecit Moyses coram universo Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְכֹל֙ הַיָּ֣ד הַחֲזָקָ֔ה וּלְכֹ֖ל הַמּוֹרָ֣א הַגָּד֑וֹל אֲשֶׁר֙ עָשָׂ֣ה מֹשֶׁ֔ה לְעֵינֵ֖י כׇּל־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the mighty hand, and great miracles, which Moses did before all Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikessa väkevässä kädessä, ja kaikissa suurissa peljättävissä töissä, jotka Moses teki koko Israelin silmäin edessä.
verses.king_james: And in all that mighty hand, and in all the great terror which Moses shewed in the sight of all Israel.
